transcript.text:
(Today's feast)
(Bulgogi)
(The representative dish of Korea, Bulgogi)
- 10 servings alone?!?!?! - Yes
(That's right) Bon appétit!
(Just like the representative eater of Korea, Tzuyang, she eats 10 servings of Korea's representative dish, Bulgogi)
It's really good...!
(Like Korea's representative, she simply...)
(Clears them)
HUH?!?!
Where does it all go?!?
You're so pretty, why do you eat so much...
(The feast scene that is unbelievable even after witnessing)
(In the middle of the streets where small snowflakes fall)
Hello, everyone
(Where is this snowy place?) It's snowing a lot and the snowstorm is no joke

(Jeonnong-dong, Dongdaemun-gu) Today, I am here at Jeonnong-dong
to visit a 40-year traditional BBQ restaurant
I heard the pork belly and other cuts are delicious here
(Today's star is "bulgogi"!) But I'm here to eat bulgogi because I crave it so much
("Jangsu Hwoegwan" Dongdaemun-gu, Seoul) It's right in the front there
Year 1983! Awesome
It's been so long since I had bulgogi and I think it'll be so good
(Full of excitement) Let's hurry inside
It's cold!
(Enters) Hello
(A delicious smell hits as soon as she enters) The delicious smell is amazing!
Awesome
(A Hanok-house style that embraces the tradition) This is exactly like a Hanok house with that old sensation
If it was built 40 years ago,
(Suddenly realizing) it's been so long
(Should I order some food?) We don't have a separate

- menu board - You don't? Thank you
(Along with bulgogi, there is a bunch of delicious food) There's fresh Korean beef sirloin, I want that! I came here for bulgogi though
There's pork belly, shoulder cut, and even spicy tripe stew?
(Restaurant that is popular online for pork belly) I saw online that the pork belly here got great reviews
They say it's really delicious!
(Staying firm) Today, I will eat bulgogi though
How much bulgogi is included in one pan?
- One pan is 4 servings! - It's up to 4 servings?
There are people who eat 1 serving or 2 servings
- Oh, 1~2 servings? - If you eat it with rice, you can eat just 1 serving
(What will Tzuyang choose?) Then..
Give me 10 servings, please!
- Right here, right now? - Yes
How many people are coming?
I'm eating alone
- 10 servings alone? - Yes

(Yes, our kid eats quite a lot) That much?
Yes
(Putting the employee's worry behind) 10 servings?
(10 servings are here!) There's a lot!
(Taste is 100% guaranteed, looks that much appetizing)
Looks so delicious, it's gonna be so good!
3 servings! Wow, thank you!
Excuse me!
Yes!
(She is not done ordering) I would like two bowls of rice in a pot
(10 servings + 2 more servings) Two of the pot rice? Okay, got it!
Hot pot rice sounds so delicious! I noticed they had it here
(She ordered it late, so she needs to wait a while...) But it's going to take 20 minutes to prepare,
so that'll be about the time when I'm done eating which is why I only ordered 2
I should've ordered it earlier, what a shame
Actually, I really love bulgogi

(The sweet and salty taste that almost everyone loves) If you mix rice with this salty bulgogi,
it's insanely good
Wait, but do you call this a Seoul-style bulgogi? This one?
(Seoul-style bulgogi is hard to come by these days) You can't find this kind of bulgogi these days!
(Right as she was about to give up, she asked the producer) I was about to give up, but the producer here found this for me
(An unexpectedly popular bulgogi place) I didn't know this place existed! It obviously looks so good!
(As it cooks, the more she feels excited) It's Korean beef bulgogi
I didn't know this but
(You can't leave out glass noodles in bulgogi!) there's glass noodles! It's amazing if you add glass noodles here
Should I add a little? Already?
(Here comes the glass noodles!)
Add the glass noodles!
(Touched) It's delicious!
That typical soy sauce base has so much flavor
and there's that deep, delicious pot bulgogi taste
Anyway, it's the best!

Congrats, a pass!
I can dig in now, right?
Bon appétit!
(Heart racing to taste the first bite of bulgogi) First, a bite of bulgogi
I'll just eat it as is at first
It looks so good
(Happy)
Maybe it's because it's Korean beef, but it's really good
The broth is good
but the bulgogi is so tender
(The scent and taste are both great) The scent of the meat itself is so good and savory
And the broth is surely salty, so I thought it'd be quite salty but it's seasoned to perfection
(This is what flavorful really means!) I love how flavorful it is!
It's so good
And the glass noodles included in bulgogi is the best
Add a huge chunk of bulgogi here

(Making it into a nice bite-size) If the meat is too big, it gets in the way of the noodles
So cut it in half!
(I'm happy because it's delicious) It's so good
Fish out the glass noodles
and if you dip the beef bulgogi into here, I bet it's good
The color as well,
(Is this mustard I'm tasting...?) there's that sting like they added mustard into here
But...
(It goes perfectly with the sauce and meat) it's good! It goes well together
(Today's feast is quite perfect)
Seriously, from the meat to the broth, it's perfect
Oh, it's been so long since I had bulgogi, and it's so good
(Her hands are busy...) Place it on top, and a piece of garlic
(This time, wrapped with a perilla leaf)
It's fresh kimchi and it's quite delicious
(What side dish is Tzuyang's fave?) I'm almost done,

and the most delicious one is the perilla leaves, it's so good
(The wrap master cannot stop) Get the pickled radish, then bulgogi
(The owner from 'Norang Tongdak' next door is here)
(Trying to let her know) I work next door
(He unexpectedly gets a peek of the filming)
Oh, you're the owner of 'Norang Tongdak'
Tzuyang is famous
(She is one of the famous mukbangers on YouTube) But more importantly, I was so surprised at how pretty she was
(I'll give this a try)
To here!
(A round of applause automatically)
(Bulgogi that is waiting for Tzuyang next) Should I eat the next one?
It'd be so nice if the hot pot rice comes out together!
(The hot pot rice she waited for is finally here!!) It's here! Awesome! Thank you
(Even the hot and savory stew) There's stew too? Here, please
Hot pot rice and stew, this is amazing!

Isn't this hot?
(Safe) It's not hot
(If so, you gotta open it right away...)
(Nutritious hot pot rice that makes you forget the winter cold) There's mushroom, kabocha, and beans
(Scooping it out before it burns...)
To here, you add water
(It's a national rule to pour water and eat the scorched rice)
Close the lid, and I'll leave it to the side for a sec
Bye!
(See you later)
(She's excited to taste the hot pot rice) Looks delicious! The hot pot rice is so shiny, it must be so chewy and good
(Hot + hot = Lava) The bulgogi is hot, the rice is hot, so it must be lava
Place the meat like this
It's so good!
(Genuinely amazed) This is crazy! It's so awesome
(Freshly made rice that is bound to be good and a nicely grilled meat on top)

It's so good
I'll scoop out the meat to cool it a little
(Scoop out a bunch and let it cool...)
(A bowl of the stew that makes rice disappear in a second) I need to eat the stew too
It's clean and refreshing like cold soybean stew
To here, add rice
(A bunch) Add it like this
Mix it, mix it!
(Cut up and add the enoki mushrooms as well)
(Her happiness level is already increasing) It looks so good! I'll dig in now
(She loves the charm of bulgogi) The bulgogi is completely my style
And then, a second round!
(Add it all)
(And pour the soup from the pan itself)
Perfect!
(The last bulgogi pan appears)

(She eats diligently as more people gather...)
Right now, it's 6 PM and the place is full with customers
(Mission : Eat as fast as I can and leave) So I think I need to eat quickly and leave
(The bulgogi is now all cooked)
The great thing about beef bulgogi is
that it cooks so quickly
(Hot pot rice she forgot about) I need to scoop the rice!
(Still hot) Look at how the hot pot rice is still hot
It insulates the heat so well
But where does it all go?!
(A customer recognized Tzuyang for the massive amount of food) Are you Tzuyang?
- Really? - She's a famous person
(Shy)
(I'll order)
Don't give us that much please
(Normally) 5 people eat 5 servings!

- (I tend to eat quite a lot...) - Why does Tzuyang eat so much?
We can never eat 10 servings!!
(Too much) Never
- Aren't you full? - Sorry? No, I'm fine
She doesn't eat every meal like that, right?
(She really ate alone?) Did the two come together?
No, no, alone!
(Not a paused screen) She ate it all alone
(She really eats it alone...) She really ate it all
I finished it faster than I thought
She has 7.45 million subscribers?!
(The subscriber count makes them awe)
(A pro mukbanger who looks for another food even before finishing) I want to try the sirloin too!
Next time I come here, I'll try the pork belly and sirloin
(Next time, promise to try other meat) Other ones are more delicious, I heard....Even the bulgogi is good
It's so good

But I'm not full at all
(Her stomach feels empty even with 12 servings...) Bulgogi isn't enough to fill my stomach!
(The scorched rice will satisfy her hunger)
Looks delicious!
It's more delicious if you eat it with the broth
Ohhh?
- Ohhh! Ohh! - I got surprised
(A customer recognizes Tzuyang and asks for a picture) Thank you
(Quick exit) Thank you!
(Quick exit) Thank you!
(The last scorched rice is with young radish kimchi soup) Should I add a bit of young radish kimchi soup here?
(I won't miss a grain of scorched rice...)
(Thumbs up)
(Once again, the plates are all empty...)
I was really craving bulgogi
(Genuine bulgogi) and it was great that I could eat such delicious bulgogi in a while
Once again, I had a great meal!
